remarks: Enchanting New England farmhouse tucked among a striking granite ledge, terraced stonework, and mature trees, offering a setting that feels removed from the ordinary while remaining conveniently close to the Route 7 Connector, I-95, the Merritt Parkway, shopping, restaurants, and the Norwalk River Valley Trail. Beneath the home's more recent improvements, its early heritage continues to reveal itself. Hints of the property's original story appear throughout, from the oversized hearth and bee-hive oven to deep-set windows, built-ins, stone accents, and details shaped over generations. The landscape becomes part of the experience itself, with dramatic granite outcroppings, layered stone terraces, and pockets ideal for gardens, gathering spaces, or quiet moments outdoors. Rich in texture, history, and individuality, the property offers a refreshing alternative to more predictable homes. Finished basement with full bathroom and private entry is perfect for an office, studio, guest space, or extended family.  Offering the opportunity to further uncover and enhance its authentic character, this farmhouse will resonate with those drawn to homes with personality, and a genuine sense of place in the heart of Norwalk. 3 full bathrooms with 4/5 bedrooms makes this home a remarkable opportunity in Norwalk!
